calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Josh Deitz, Esq. of ROGERS JOSEPH O'DONNELL, T:415.956.2828, for petitioner;
David Ginsberg, Esq. and Nathaniel P. Bualat, Esq. of CROWELL MORING, T:415.986.2800, for respondent.

The Court provided the parties with a copy of his tentative ruling at the start of the hearing. The matter was passed to allow parties to read the tentative ruling.

RULING: The matter was argued. The California and Federal Standing Law were discussed.

After hearing, the Court takes DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Continued To Jan-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
